title: TraceEvent
description: An immutable audit log entry recording a single significant event in the execution lifecycle. Produced by agent-kernel.

event_type.description: Core event types. Adding new types requires a spec update.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this event occurred.

capability_id.description: The capability involved in this event, if applicable.

principal.description: The principal involved in this event, if applicable.

decision_id.description: The PolicyDecision ID associated with this event, if applicable.

frame_id.description: The Frame ID associated with this event, if applicable.

handle_id.description: The Handle ID associated with this event, if applicable.

outcome.description: Optional high-level outcome of the event.

error_message.description: Error message if the event represents a failure.
